title: Item Protection
description: It prevents using the item to mine or attack
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vRMGPNVO/images/79d84471101e129d663b1af2f8dc4b8caca38b65.png)


## Features
No this doesn't allow you to repair items infinitely, nor does it give them infinite durability. It prevents using the item to mine or attack when the durability is at 4
